backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, hero, venue highlights, contact, maps) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose and key contents.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the KGF Villa app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, VenueHighlights, Contact, and Footer into anchored sections.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component displaying phone, address, and hours cards alongside a WhatsApp CTA button and an embedded Google Maps iframe for the KGF Villa location.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Dark-themed footer with brand, contact, and WhatsApp booking columns, a gold gradient top border, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section featuring a background image with gradient overlay, animated KGF Villa heading, italic tagline, gold decorative ornaments, and WhatsApp and explore CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo, a mobile hamburger menu, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button that becomes opaque on scroll.
Section component displaying a 3-column grid of six venue feature cards (halls, gardens, catering, etc.) with icons, titles, and descriptions under a 'Why Choose KGF Villa?' heading.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining a wedding-themed oklch color palette (gold, ivory, charcoal) as CSS custom properties for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom wedding-palette colors (gold, ivory, whatsapp), Playfair Display/Lato fonts, gold box shadows, and fade-in-up keyframe animation.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and requirements for a single-page static wedding villa website for KGF Villa, including business details, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements.
